subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! The letter of His honor 'Alí - upon him be My glory - which he had written unto thee, was presented before this Wronged One and was read. Praise be unto God, the fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی نامه جناب علی علیه بهائی که بانجناب نوشته بود نزد مظلوم حاضر و قرات شد لله الحمد عرف
